## What this PR adds

<!-- One asset per PR, please -->

## Checklist (the bar is high — see CONTRIBUTING.md)

- [ ] Follows [templates/ASSET_TEMPLATE.md](../templates/ASSET_TEMPLATE.md) — ALL frontmatter fields filled (`hook`, `email_subject`, `short_pitch` included)
- [ ] **"When I use it" is a real scenario** you actually lived — no invented results, no invented numbers
- [ ] Any statistic cites a named source + year + URL
- [ ] Arabic content is عامية with English business terms — never فصحى, never literal translation
- [ ] 2-3 internal links in "Related assets" + parent folder README updated
- [ ] Brand footer appended (original assets) — or attribution header + source license (community assets, MIT/CC0 only)
- [ ] `python3 scripts/check_links.py` passes locally
